title: CLI Changelog Entry
description: Schema for CLI changelog entries in the unreleased directory

summary.description: Description of the change. Use multi-line format for longer descriptions.

type.description: Type of change: feat (new feature), fix (bug fix), chore (maintenance), internal (internal change), break (breaking change)

severity.description: Semantic version impact: major (breaking), minor (new feature), patch (bug fix/chore)

ChangelogType.title: Changelog Type
ChangelogType.description: The type of change being made

Severity.title: Severity
Severity.description: The semantic version impact of this change
